summary: doctor/check now surface Architecture Baseline health and packaged Plugin Skill health without asking for project-local Skill copies: doctor has plugin_manifest/plugin_skills/manifest_plugin_state checks, check reports architecture_check clear, and project-health Skill explicitly says install/upgrade do not copy Skills into projects.
reviewability: Run doctor and check, then inspect the project-health Skill and protocol recovery rule.
limitations: This validates current ready-state and current warnings; separate negative-fixture tests cover broken/missing states in the test suite.
